plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate high risk.
Trim semiconductor exposure and reduce SPY concentration.
Increase allocation to income-generating QQQI.
Add a new, quality long setup from the scanner.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with lower volatility.
Expect a lower target return with a focus on steady, low-drawdown performance.
conservative.read: This mode aims for capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces risk by cutting leveraged positions and trimming concentrated sectors, holding a larger cash buffer for stability.

plan: Reduce exposure to leveraged ETFs, keeping a small position in SOXL.
Trim SPY and semiconductor exposure to meet concentration limits.
Add new, quality tech names like AMZN and ZS from the scanner.
This creates a more diversified portfolio with controlled leverage.
The focus is on risk-first growth, blending broad index and quality tech.
Expect a target return of approximately 2.5% per month with moderate risk.
balanced.read: This balanced approach targets around 2.5% per month by prioritizing risk reduction while seeking growth. It trims leverage and concentration, adds quality names, and maintains a moderate cash buffer.

plan: Increase allocation to SOXL and semiconductors, leaning into strength.
Add inverse ETFs like TZA and SOXS for potential downside capture.
Reduce SPY concentration to comply with mandates.
This plan embraces higher leverage and concentration for aggressive growth.
Expect higher potential upside but also significantly increased drawdown risk.
Target return is around 4% per month, requiring strict stop discipline.
aggressive.read: This aggressive mode aims for stretched growth, targeting around 4% per month by increasing leverage and concentration in high-scoring setups. It carries the highest potential for both gains and losses, with significant drawdown risk due to leverage and ETF decay.

plan: Eliminate all leveraged ETFs and reduce high-beta sector exposure.
Significantly increase allocation to income-focused QQQI.
Add broad index SPY to enhance income generation and stability.
Trim QQQ to reallocate capital towards income-producing assets.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and capital preservation.
Expect a lower target return of around 1% per month with minimal drawdown.
income.read: This income-focused mode targets around 1% per month by prioritizing steady monthly distributions and capital preservation. It rotates heavily into income-generating ETFs like QQQI and broad index ETFs, minimizing volatility and high-beta exposure.
